add_projects.text: Each project contains its own set of tasks, todos & members. Projects in a workspace must be from the same organization.
available_projects.text: You have access to {{count}} projects in this organization that are not yet in any of your workspaces. Would you like to add them here?
continue_after_org.text: Finished setting up your organization? Create your workspace and add projects to it.
create_workspace.text: A workspace is where you spend most time: a personal board for projects.
delete_workspace_notice.text: You can only delete your workspace if you have another workspace in the same organization. After deleting, you can then optionally add the projects to another workspace. The projects and project data remain available to all project members.
delete_workspace_restricted.text: Delete disabled because this is your only workspace in the organization.
group_tasks: Group tasks as todos under new task
imported_tasks.text: Your tasks have been imported and are being processed. Reload your page to see the results.
label: Label
move_project.text: Move this project to a different workspace within your organization.
older_accepted_table_only: The {{count}} accepted tasks are only visible in the table view.
onboarding_completed.text: Have a look around to explore the features of {{appName}}.
onboarding_demo_ready.text: Create personal workspaces, add projects, and manage tasks with your team.
onboarding_welcome.text: A high density workspace for tasks. 🚀 Work fast - have fun!
organization_required.text: An organization is required for workspaces. Please create an organization first or ask to be invited to an existing organization.
primary_labels.text: Each new project starts with these task types, including their color and icon. Project admins can customize them per project; customized types stop following these organization defaults.
project_members.text: Add, change or remove project members.
project_membership_settings.text: Manage your personal membership for this project.
project_not_public.text: This project is private. You need to sign in and/or request access.
project_workspace_settings.text: Choose where this project appears in your personal workspaces.
public_access_warn.text: Attachments created while public access is on will be public. Otherwise, private.
select_project.text: Select project that exist in organization {{name}} to add to your workspace.
split.text: Reorganize your project's task board. Select which tasks to move from the main column into a new column.
success.project_disconnected: Project has been disconnected from workspace.
success.project_moved: Project has been moved to another workspace
unassigned_projects_one: You have access to {{count}} project in this organization that is not yet in any of your workspaces. Would you like to add it here?
unassigned_projects_other: You have access to {{count}} projects in this organization that are not yet in any of your workspaces. Would you like to add them here?
